title: Turkish Chicken Skewers
description: A flavorful and spicy twist on traditional chicken skewers, inspired by Turkish cuisine.

ingredients.name: Turkish spice blend
ingredients.notes: available at most Middle Eastern grocery stores

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together Turkish spice blend, garlic, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
Add chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the spice mixture.
Thread chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the chicken is cooked through.
Serve hot, garnished with crispy sumac if desired.
Optional: serve with a side of rice or salad for a more filling meal.
